expected_artifacts.name: codeclash_logs
expected_artifacts.purpose: Preserve tournament, game, and combined logs from the no-LLM CodeClash smoke.

expected_artifacts.name: arena_result
expected_artifacts.purpose: Parse round scores, winner, and valid submission flags from the CodeClash run.

expected_artifacts.name: agent_workspace
expected_artifacts.purpose: Record whether each agent workspace changed, and keep empty-diff claims explicit.

expected_artifacts.name: receipt_review
expected_artifacts.purpose: Review whether the receipt proves task completion or only infrastructure execution.

first_run_falsifier: The slice fails if the CodeClash dummy tournament cannot produce logs and parsed round results under a responsive Docker engine.
